creator: llwang@infor.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

Please use the following patch instead, as
* PORTEPOCH cannot be removed.
* plist is changed.

diff -urN py-numpy.orig/Makefile py-numpy/Makefile
- --- py-numpy.orig/Makefile	2010-03-12 05:39:17.000000000 -0600
+++ py-numpy/Makefile	2010-04-25 21:44:05.218844148 -0500
@@ -6,7 +6,7 @@
 #
 
 PORTNAME=	numpy
- -PORTVERSION=	1.4.0
+PORTVERSION=	1.4.1
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	math python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://numpy.scipy.org/:doc \
diff -urN py-numpy.orig/distinfo py-numpy/distinfo
- --- py-numpy.orig/distinfo	2010-02-15 19:51:49.000000000 -0600
+++ py-numpy/distinfo	2010-04-25 21:44:59.289679815 -0500
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
- -MD5 (numpy-1.4.0.tar.gz) = 6d0ea698beda38109796240d08ecb296
- -SHA256 (numpy-1.4.0.tar.gz) = b8dbdb2c8459699b4021b72237222e4b7314d0bacecce5951a6a1318de32270d
- -SIZE (numpy-1.4.0.tar.gz) = 2215411
+MD5 (numpy-1.4.1.tar.gz) = 5c7b5349dc3161763f7f366ceb96516b
+SHA256 (numpy-1.4.1.tar.gz) = 2e7bb84573e5123e07f3c919fd433bc09b78d606252b6b719e385c2a981d8e06
+SIZE (numpy-1.4.1.tar.gz) = 2201795
 MD5 (numpybook.pdf) = 637180cd704dc8be4036c09412501397
 SHA256 (numpybook.pdf) = 8c9692db7373838c585073e4141ae4bd3b8793dffd59ce3544bf851e71e9b865
 SIZE (numpybook.pdf) = 2148630
diff -urN py-numpy.orig/pkg-plist py-numpy/pkg-plist
- --- py-numpy.orig/pkg-plist	2010-02-15 21:23:46.322187000 -0600
+++ py-numpy/pkg-plist	2010-04-25 21:56:12.401330519 -0500
@@ -123,7 +123,6 @@
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/numpy/core/tests/data/astype_copy.pkl
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/numpy/core/tests/data/recarray_from_file.fits
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/numpy/core/tests/test_blasdot.py
- -%%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/numpy/core/tests/test_datetime.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/numpy/core/tests/test_defchararray.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/numpy/core/tests/test_dtype.py
 %%PYTHON_SITELIBDIR%%/numpy/core/tests/test_errstate.py
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNATURE-----
